title: gymnogramma glandulosa
intro: Gymnogramma glandulosa, also known as the glandular gymnogramma, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gymnogramma glandulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Gymnogramma glandulosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
